task: Write and run a FastAPI endpoint GET /items/{item_id} that takes an int path parameter and returns {"item_id": item_id}. Verify it returns 200 for /items/7.
expect: 200 with item_id echoed; a non-int path 422s

task: Write and run a FastAPI endpoint GET /search with an optional query parameter q (str, default None) that returns {"q": q}. Verify both a present and an absent q.
Write and run a POST /users endpoint that accepts a Pydantic User model (name: str, age: int with a constraint age > 0). Verify a valid body returns 200 and a negative age returns 422.
Write and run a FastAPI endpoint GET /items that uses a Depends() pagination dependency (skip: int = 0, limit: int = 10) and returns the resolved dict. Verify skip is read from the query string.
Write and run a POST /items endpoint declared with status_code=201 that returns the created item. Verify the response status is 201.
Write and run a FastAPI endpoint that reads a custom request header X-Token via Header() and returns {"x_token": value}. Verify it echoes a supplied header.
Write and run a GET /items/{item_id} endpoint that raises HTTPException(status_code=404, detail='Item not found') when item_id is unknown. Verify the 404 and its detail.
Write and run a POST /users endpoint with a response_model that omits a password field from the returned object. Verify the password is not present in the response.
expect: 200 with password stripped from the body

task: Write and run a POST /notify endpoint that uses BackgroundTasks to schedule a callback and returns {"status": "queued"} with 200. Verify the response.

Write and run a POST /login endpoint that accepts form fields username and password via Form() and returns {"username": username}. Verify a form post returns the username. (May require python-multipart.)
expect: 200 echoing username (or an honest dependency error if python-multipart is absent)
